name: Gazebo
description: A small round/octagonal outdoor pavilion: an octagonal stone or wood floor about 5 blocks across, six to eight corner posts rising three blocks, a pyramidal roof of inward-facing stairs capped by an apex block, and a single hanging lantern under the apex. Perimeter benches face inward toward the centre and one or two flower pots dress the floor — the gazebo is the canonical 'public outdoor room' for a garden or plaza.

required_furniture.rule: A 5x5 @floor square with its four corners removed, leaving an 8-sided footprint centred on (cx, cz) at y0.
Six to eight @primary posts rising 3 blocks from the octagon's outer vertices — four cardinal edge midpoints plus four diagonal vertices when the footprint allows it.
Pyramidal roof above the posts: @roof corner caps on each post column, four @stairs blocks on the cardinal edges facing inward, and one @roof apex block at the very top.
One `minecraft:lantern[hanging=true]` hanging from the underside of the apex, directly above the centre of the floor.
@stairs blocks placed on the floor between the cardinal posts, facing inward toward the centre. Two additional diagonal benches are added when the AABB is at least 7 wide and 7 deep.
One or two `minecraft:flower_pot` decorations on the floor, tucked between benches and never on the lantern column.

placement_rules: Posts sit at the octagon vertices so the open sides between them stay walkable.
Lantern hangs from the apex so light pools at the centre of the floor (Pools of Light).
Flower pots dress the floor without blocking sightlines across the pavilion.
lighting_ventilation: The hanging lantern under the apex provides the full night-light budget on Java 1.16.5; the open sides between the eight posts give complete cross-ventilation and sightlines out into the surrounding garden or plaza.

medieval.notes: Oak-log posts under a dark-oak pyramid — a village-green gazebo on a cobblestone pad.

modern.notes: Smooth-stone posts and stairs on a polished-andesite pad — a minimal pavilion for a city park.

fantasy.notes: Dark-oak posts under a purpur apex with a sea-lantern glow — an enchanted gazebo at the heart of a moonlit garden.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.gazebo.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
